revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''1-1-385

The part of the recording equipment that places the information in the store.


Note: 1  In German the term Speicher is also used for the recorded material (record).


Note: 2  In French a recorder for sound signals is called a magnetophone and a recorder for visual signals is called a magnetoscope.

{{IALAFooter}}
